code:
---
title: TC Scheduler Phase Timing
---
sequenceDiagram
  participant Scheduler
  participant Stepper as Rule110 Stepper
  participant Storage as TcStorage
  participant Emitter as Headless Emitter

  Scheduler->>Stepper: capture(Education_GradeSync)
  Stepper->>Storage: ensureState(Education_LMS_Portal)
  Stepper-->>Emitter: tc.rule110.snapshot payload
  Scheduler->>Stepper: compute(Education_LMS_Portal)
  Stepper->>Storage: buffer updates
  Scheduler->>Stepper: commit(Education_ContentCDN)
  Stepper->>Storage: swap buffers
  Stepper-->>Emitter: hashed frame metadata
repo_description: A browser-based sandbox for exploring emergent intelligence in swarms of reinforcement learning agents, featuring interactive participation, dynamic ecology, and Turing Complete integration.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个TC调度器的时序图，核心是想展示Rule110 Stepper怎么处理教育场景的三个数据源：GradeSync、LMS Portal和ContentCDN。调度器作为入口，先触发capture，然后Stepper要确保LMS Portal的状态，最后把结果通过Headless Emitter发出去。
明白了，Scheduler到Stepper是capture GradeSync，然后Stepper要去Storage确保LMS Portal的状态。这里Storage用的是TcStorage对吧？还有Emitter的交互是实线还是虚线？因为看起来像是异步通知。
对，Storage就是TcStorage。Emitter那边用虚线箭头，因为是tc.rule110.snapshot的payload推送，异步的。然后Scheduler还要再触发一次compute，针对LMS Portal做计算，这时候Stepper会先把更新buffer到Storage里。
好，我加上Scheduler→Stepper的compute(Education_LMS_Portal)，以及Stepper→Storage的buffer updates。接下来是commit ContentCDN吗？
是的，最后Scheduler触发commit给ContentCDN，Stepper这时候要和Storage做swap buffers，把之前的buffer正式切换。然后Emitter再发一次hashed frame metadata，整个相位就完成了。
确认一下顺序：capture GradeSync → ensureState LMS Portal → snapshot payload → compute LMS Portal → buffer updates → commit ContentCDN → swap buffers → hashed metadata。这样是完整的TC Scheduler Phase Timing流程吗？
稍等，compute之后buffer updates是Stepper到Storage，但swap buffers是在commit ContentCDN之后，这个顺序别搞反了。还有snapshot payload那条线，标签应该是tc.rule110.snapshot，不是单独的snapshot。
已修正，swap buffers放在commit之后，标签也改成tc.rule110.snapshot。图完成了，标题用TC Scheduler Phase Timing。
